title: Fit test - 2nd screen Fail and Cancel
scenario: Fit Test does not return to Device Settings screen after canceling or failing on the second screen
steps: Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Scroll to and tap on 'Fit Test'
On the 2nd screen of the fit test, either cancel the test or let it fail
expected: The fit test screen closes and the user is returned to the Device Settings screen.
